name: Beef Jerky - for Those Who Don't Have Smokers
recipeIngredient: 1/3 C Lea and Perrins Worcestershire Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the venison roast into 1/4 inch strips.
2. In a deep container, combine soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
3. Add the meat strips to the marinade, turning every hour or so to ensure even coating. Push the meat down into the sauce.
4. Remove the rack from the oven and place it over a sink.
5. Insert a toothpick through the ends of each piece of meat and hang between the bars of the oven rack.
6. Line the bottom of the oven with aluminum foil.
7. Place the rack back in the oven and bake at 140°F for 4 to 6 hours.
8. Turn off the oven and allow the jerky to hang inside the oven overnight.
